## Summary

<!-- What does this change do and why? -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Refactor / chore

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests added or updated
- [ ] `make verify` passes
- [ ] Interop test passes (for `internal/crypto` changes)
- [ ] Documentation updated in `docs/en/` and `docs/ru/` (if user-facing)
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` and `CHANGELOG.ru.md` updated (if user-facing)
- [ ] Commits follow Conventional Commits
